app.name: Nook
app.description: A Digital Sanctuary for Close Friends

auth.welcomeMessage: A private space for you and your closest friends. Messages fade after 30 days.
auth.invitedBy: You've been invited to Nook by {{name}}
auth.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to log out?
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.createOwnerDesc: Become the first owner of Nook and invite your friends.
auth.inviteSubtitle: A private space for close friends
auth.inviteWelcome: You've been invited to join Nook by
auth.inviteUsed: This invite has already been used
auth.inviteOwnerDeleted: The person who invited you is no longer here
auth.inviteSignupDesc: Create your account to start chatting

sidebar.title: Conversations
sidebar.emptyHint: Ask an Owner to send you an invite link — then your shared chat will appear here.

messages.loadMore: Scroll up to load older messages

composer.sendFailed: Failed to send. Please try again.

editError.notOwner: You can only edit your own messages
editError.alreadyEdited: This message has already been edited
editError.badKind: Only text messages can be edited

recallError.notOwner: You can only recall your own messages
recallError.alreadyRecalled: This message has already been recalled

deleteError.notOwner: You can only delete your own messages

replyError.notFound: The message you're replying to no longer exists
replyError.wrongConversation: You cannot reply to messages from another conversation
replyError.notMember: You're no longer a member of this conversation
replyError.badKind: You cannot reply to system messages

reactionError.badKind: You cannot react to system messages
reactionError.notMember: You're no longer a member of this conversation

exifWarning.title: Image contains metadata
exifWarning.body: This image includes EXIF metadata (camera, location, etc.). Per Nook's no-compression policy, the original bytes will be sent with metadata intact.

dropZone.title: Drag to upload
dropZone.hint: Up to 50 MB · images, PDFs, docs

errors.unsupportedExt: Avatar filename must have a file extension

adminBox.title: Admin
adminBox.subtitle: Owner-only actions. All actions are immediate.

invite.title: Friend invites
invite.subtitle: Generate a one-time link to bring a friend into your Nook.

password.title: Reset password
password.subtitle: Generate a one-time link to reset a friend's password.

inviteNew.title: Create invite link
inviteNew.subtitle: Generate a one-time link a friend can use to join your Nook. Links expire after 24 hours.
inviteNew.targetKindAnyHint: Friend starts a private chat with you.
inviteNew.targetKindConversationHint: Friend joins a group they're invited to.

error.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
error.forbidden: Only the Owner can create invites.
error.internal: Couldn't create invite. Please try again.

passwordReset.noFriends: You don't have any friends yet.

error.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
error.forbidden: Only the Owner can reset passwords.
error.alreadyPending: This friend already has a pending password reset link. Wait for them to use it (or revoke it) before sending another.
error.internal: Couldn't create reset link. Please try again.

deleteFriend.title: Delete a friend
deleteFriend.subtitle: Revoke a friend's access to all conversations. Their messages stay visible to you so old history is preserved.
deleteFriend.noFriends: You don't have any friends yet.

confirm.title: Delete {{name}}?
confirm.message: Removing {{name}} revokes their access to all conversations immediately. Their message history stays in your view — this is non-destructive so old context is preserved.
confirm.warning: This action cannot be undone. The friend will not be notified.

error.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
error.forbidden: Only the Owner can delete friends.
error.internal: Couldn't delete friend. Please try again.

logout.title: Log out
logout.subtitle: End your current session. You'll need to sign in again with your email and password to come back.

confirm.title: Log out of Nook?
confirm.message: Your session will end and you'll return to the welcome screen. Any unsent messages in your composer will be lost.

error.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
error.generic: Couldn't log you out. Please try again.

confirmModal.confirmLabel: Type "{{phrase}}" to enable the submit button

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.networkError: Network connection failed, please check and retry

resetPlaceholder.title: Reset your password
resetPlaceholder.subtitle: The complete password-reset flow lands in a future update. Your Owner has generated a one-time link that becomes usable once the friend-side completion ships.

resetComplete.title: Reset your password
resetComplete.subtitle: Enter a new password to regain access to your Nook.

success.title: Password reset successful
success.message: Your password has been updated. You can now log in with your new password.

errors.invalidToken: Invalid reset link. Please check the URL or ask your Owner for a new reset link.
errors.tokenNotFound: This reset link was not found. It may have been mistyped or is invalid.
errors.tokenExpired: This reset link has expired. Please ask your Owner for a new one.
errors.tokenUsed: This reset link has already been used. If you need to reset again, ask your Owner for a new link.
errors.tokenRevoked: This reset link has been revoked by the Owner. Please ask for a new one.
errors.invalidInput: Invalid input. Please check your password and try again.
errors.internal: Couldn't reset password. Please try again.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
